MENU

Bring Your Idea to Life with Okan

The aim of Istanbul Okan University Incubation Center is to provide an environment, information and support to the students and academicians of Istanbul Okan University who have innovative and commercializable ideas and/or start-up companies to develop their ideas.

If you have an innovative idea, you can send an e-mail to

infoarproged@okan.edu.tr
